results.title: /account/coupons page load
checks: Page heading 'All coupons & promotions' visible (h1)
Sidebar 'Coupons & promotions' link highlighted under Marketing section
16 coupon cards rendered on page 1
Coupon cards display: discount amount, name, description, expiry date, copy button
results.details: Page loads correctly. Heading, sidebar link, and coupon cards all present. Sidebar organized under 'Marketing' section. Cards include SUPER, E2E-COUPON, THRESH50, CAT20, FREESHIP, WINE, FIXED5, QA, AIR, FREE, EXCLUSIVE10, QA10OFF, SUPER (Test 100%), MUESLI, QA2, LOVE.

results.title: Copy coupon code to clipboard
checks: Click to copy button present on coupon card
Notification 'Coupon copied successfully' appears after click
Close alert button available on notification
results.details: Clicked 'QA10OFF Click to copy' button. 'Coupon copied successfully' notification appeared in Notifications region. Close button (X) available to dismiss.

results.title: Apply copied coupon in cart (E2E)
checks: 'Enter a promo-coupon' textbox exists in Order summary sidebar
Apply button enables when coupon code entered
Coupon applied successfully (discount updates)
'Deny' button appears after coupon applied
results.details: Navigated to /cart with 2 items ($200 subtotal). Typed 'QA10OFF' into promo-coupon textbox. Apply button became enabled. After clicking Apply: discount changed from -$0.02 to -$20.02, tax adjusted from $70 to $66, total recalculated from $419.98 to $395.98. 'Deny' button replaced 'Apply' button. Textbox became disabled showing applied code.

results.title: Admin Promotion IsPublic field
checks: Marketing > Promotions blade opens
Promotion detail blade opens on row click
IsPublic toggle/checkbox visible in detail blade
results.details: Navigated to Admin SPA > Marketing > Promotions. Opened 'Super Discount' promotion detail blade. Found 'Public' label with INPUT bound to ng-model='blade.currentEntity.isPublic'. Other fields confirmed: Active, Promotion name, Label (localized), Localized name, Localized description, Start date, Expiration date, Stores, Coupons widget, Usage History widget, Description, Exclusivity, Can be redeemed more than once.

results.title: GraphQL promotionCoupons query
checks: GraphiQL interface loads on platform backend
/graphql endpoint responds to promotionCoupons query
Query editor, variables panel, result window all present
results.details: GraphiQL UI loads at BACK_URL/ui/graphiql with full editor (Execute, Prettify, Merge, Copy buttons), Variables/Headers panels, Result Window. Direct POST to FRONT_URL/graphql with promotionCoupons query returns valid GraphQL validation error (missing storeId argument) confirming endpoint is live and query type exists. NOTE: /ui/graphiql returns 404 on storefront -- it is only on platform backend. Test case should specify BACK_URL.

results.title: Frontend calls /graphql not /xapi/graphql
checks: Network requests show POST to /graphql
No requests to /xapi/graphql
All GraphQL requests return HTTP 200
results.details: Monitored network requests on /account/coupons page. All 8 GraphQL POST requests went to https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/graphql (not /xapi/graphql). All returned HTTP 200. Additional requests: GA4 analytics (204), CDN rum (204/aborted), Azure App Insights (200). One non-critical 404 on /assets/presets/jensen.json (theme preset).

results.title: Pagination on coupons page
checks: Pagination controls visible
Page 1 active, page 2 available
Previous button disabled on page 1
Next button enabled
results.details: Pagination present below coupon cards. Page '1' displayed as current (non-button text), page '2' as clickable button. 'Previous' button disabled (correct for page 1). 'Next' button enabled and clickable. 16 coupons displayed on page 1, confirming pagination activates when count exceeds page size.

results.title: 'Deny' button removes coupon from cart
checks: Deny button visible next to applied coupon
Deny button is clickable
Clicking Deny removes coupon and restores totals
results.details: After applying QA10OFF coupon, 'Deny' button appeared replacing Apply button. Clicked Deny -- coupon removed, discount reverted from -$20.02 to -$0.02, tax from $66 to $70, total from $395.98 to $419.98. Textbox re-enabled and cleared. Apply button returned (disabled since textbox empty).

results.title: Discount breakdown expandable section
checks: Discount row in order summary is expandable
Expand/collapse icon present
results.details: In Order summary sidebar, 'Discount' is rendered as a button (not static text) with an expand/collapse arrow icon. Shows '- $0.02' (or '- $20.02' with coupon). Clicking expands to show discount breakdown details.

results.title: Label field on coupon card
checks: Coupon cards render with structured content
Label element present on cards (if configured in Admin)
results.details: Coupon cards render with: discount amount (paragraph), promotion name (paragraph), description (paragraph), expiry date, and copy button. No distinct 'label' element was observed as a separate UI element -- the promotion name and description are rendered as paragraph elements. In Admin, the 'Label' field exists (localized, es-ES/pl-PL) on the promotion detail blade, but its rendering on the storefront coupon card is not distinguishable as a separate labeled element from the promotion name. The test case should clarify whether 'Label' refers to the localized label field or the promotion name display.

errors: Firefox can't establish connection (WebSocket subscriptions-transport-ws) - Expected, non-blocking
Possibly unhandled rejection (AngularJS) - Occurs during login redirect, non-blocking

networkIssues.note: Theme preset file not found. Non-functional, cosmetic only.

notes: CPN-022: GraphiQL is on platform backend (BACK_URL/ui/graphiql), NOT storefront. Test case should specify correct URL.
CPN-052: The 'Label' field exists in Admin promotion detail (localized). Its rendering on storefront coupon cards needs clarification in the test case.
All storefront warnings are 'aria-hidden with focusable descendants' - known Vue/accessibility pattern, non-blocking.
Admin SPA Angular snapshot was empty (typical for AngularJS apps) - verified via evaluate() and screenshots.

teardown.note: Admin session left active (browser closed directly). No test data was modified.
